faqs.question: How can I get into Shriram Shikshan Sanstha's College of Pharmacy for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Shriram Shikshan Sanstha's College of Pharmacy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.Pharma Candidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council. The mentioned marks of SC/ST and OBC is for the candidate belonging to maharashtra State. Candidates who are appearing at the qualifying examination are also eligible. Maharashtra State candidates must have to appear for MHTCET. All India Candidates need to appear for MHTCET/NEET. However, preference shall be given to the candidate obtaining non zero positive score in NEET over the candidates who obtained non zero score in MHTCET.
D.Pharma Candidate passed 10+2 (science stream) with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Mathematics or Any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply

highlights.summary:
NSDC, or the National Skill Development Corporation, is a prominent catalyst in India’s skill development landscape. It functions as a facilitator through partnership funding within a Public-Private Partnership (PPP) model, and it’s under the Ministry of Skill Development & Entrepreneurship (MSDE).

This large skill ecosystem does not directly operate as a course provider, but forms partnerships and implements various government initiatives. NSDC has accredited training centres and partners all over India to empower Indian youth, basing its offerings through evaluating latest market demands.

While the official NSDC website opens doors to apprenticeship and lab-based vocational training, it enables online learning for the broader Skill India Mission through Skill India Digital Hub under the section labelled as NSDC Academy.

Some of the certifications from here are defined under the well-defined National Skills Qualifications Framework that lead to employment opportunities.

Also, it supports various schemes such as PMKVY, PMKK, and TITP, through which it has been equally helping the underserved population and urban jobseekers with employability skills since 2008.

highlights.summary:
SGS is recognized as the world's leading Testing, Inspection, and Certification (TIC) company, operating a vast network of 2,700+ laboratories and business facilities across 119 countries. With a workforce of approximately 99,250 dedicated professionals, SGS has delivered service excellence for more than 145 years.
SGS offers a comprehensive range of services categorized into three main areas: Testing, Inspection, and Certification. Their testing services ensure that products and processes meet rigorous quality standards, while inspection services help clients comply with regulatory requirements. Certification services are designed to mitigate risks and enhance operational efficiency through thorough audits.
Additionally, SGS provides high-quality training and consultancy services to keep organizations updated on the latest standards and regulations. They offer certifications in numerous fields, including ISO standards, environmental management, and quality management, helping organizations demonstrate compliance and improve marketability.
